mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_task (taskid, roomid, content, creator, createtime, updatetime) VALUES (#{taskid}, #{roomid}, #{content}, #{creator}, #{createtime}, #{updatetime})
mapper.select: SELECT taskid, roomid, content, creator, createtime, updatetime FROM room_task WHERE roomid = #{roomid} ORDER BY createtime ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_task WHERE roomid = #{roomid}
